implementation_plan:
# Emergent Scholar Protocol (ESP) & Automated Daily Improvement

This plan outlines the activation of **Mode 7: EMERGENT** for the academic domain. We will consolidate the "AI Mastermind Alliance" intelligence layers into a recursive, automated pipeline that refines academic outputs, monitors for new materials, and maintains a high-context "Scholar Vault."

## User Review Required

> [!IMPORTANT]
> This upgrade involves centralizing academic scripts into `/06_System/Execution` and `/06_System/Scripts`. While existing files will remain, new automated workflows will prioritize these central hubs.
>
> [!TIP]
> This "Daily Improvement" hook will run a system-wide audit and optimization every morning, including auto-refining study guides and converting new drafts to professional Word documents.

## Proposed Changes

### [Scholar Core]

#### [NEW] [scholar_intel_sync.py](file:///Users/infinite27/AILCC_PRIME/06_System/Execution/scholar_intel_sync.py)

A central intelligence daemon that:

* Monitors `02_Resources/Academics/00_Moodle_Drops` for new PDFs/materials.
* Processes narratives and updates `scholar_data.json`.
* Triggers the "Academic Foundry" for auto-conversion of new Markdown drafts.

#### [NEW] [academic_foundry.py](file:///Users/infinite27/AILCC_PRIME/06_System/Execution/academic_foundry.py)

An evolved version of `academic_docx_v4.py` that:

* Supports multiple academic templates (APA, MLA, Mount Allison Standard).
* Automatically extracts metadata (Name, Course, Date) from Markdown frontmatter.
* Handles batch processing for all courses.

### [System Optimization]

#### [NEW] [daily_intelligence_sync.py](file:///Users/infinite27/AILCC_PRIME/06_System/Execution/daily_intelligence_sync.py)

A daily recursive improvement script that:

* Orchestrates a "Convergence Audit" of all intelligence vaults.
* Suggests refinements to existing Markdown study guides based on new lecture content.
* Cleans and organizes the system environment (deleting temp files, updating logs).

### [Dashboard & Observability]

#### [MODIFY] [relay.js](file:///Users/infinite27/AILCC_PRIME/01_Areas/Codebases/ailcc/dashboard/server/relay.js)

* **Port Migration**: Move the primary relay port from 3001 to **5001** to align with the frontend `NeuralSyncProvider` and `health.ts` monitor.
* **Event Bus Integration**: Add a file watcher to `06_System/Execution/event_bus.log` to broadcast real-time events to the dashboard UI.
* **Telemetry Expansion**: Broaden the heartbeat payload to include `Academic Mastery` gains and `Scholar Vault` statistics.

#### [MODIFY] [ScholarPortal.tsx](file:///Users/infinite27/AILCC_PRIME/01_Areas/Codebases/ailcc/dashboard/src/components/AILCC_V2/ScholarPortal.tsx)

* **Live Data Fetching**: Replace mock search results with a real API call to search the `04_Intelligence_Vault` via the relay.
* **Audit Integration**: Wire up the "Run Audit Script" button to trigger the `scholar_intel_sync.py` script.

#### [NEW] [NerveCenter.tsx](file:///Users/infinite27/AILCC_PRIME/01_Areas/Codebases/ailcc/dashboard/components/NerveCenter.tsx)

* A new high-level "System Visualization" component showing the communication flows between Antigravity, Valentine, and Comet.

## Verification Plan

### Automated Verification

* Run `scholar_intel_sync.py` and verify it detects a test file in `00_Moodle_Drops`.
* Execute `academic_foundry.py` on a dummy Markdown file and check the `.docx` formatting.
* Verify `daily_intelligence_sync.py` correctly updates the `last_sync` timestamp in `scholar_data.json`.

### Manual Verification

* Review the generated "Master Intelligence Report" for clarity and accuracy.
* Validate that new documents appear in the correct course directories without manual intervention.

## Mode 8: Cross-Platform Alliance Sync

This phase establishes the "AI Mastermind Alliance" as a distributed network.

### Mode 8 Proposed Changes

#### [NEW] [generate_sync_packet.py](file:///Users/infinite27/AILCC_PRIME/06_System/Execution/generate_sync_packet.py) [COMPLETED]

A utility to aggregate:

* Current `agents_registry.json`.
* Recent `event_bus.jsonl` entries.
* Active `task.md` and `implementation_plan.md` state.

#### [NEW] [alliance_improvement_protocol.py](file:///Users/infinite27/AILCC_PRIME/06_System/Execution/alliance_improvement_protocol.py) [COMPLETED]

An automation script that:

* Parses "Synapse" files generated by external AIs.
* Extracts `DIRECTIVE: action` blocks.
* Automatically appends them to the system `task.md`.

#### [NEW] [alliance_sync_protocol.md](file:///Users/infinite27/AILCC_PRIME/06_System/Synapses/alliance_sync_protocol.md) [COMPLETED]

The formal definition of how external AIs should interact with the Prime framework.

#### [ORCHESTRATION] Browser-Based Synchronization

We will use the browser assistant to:

1. Navigate to **Claude.ai** or **ChatGPT**.
2. Provide the content of `current_system_packet.json`.
3. Execute the "Master Sync Prompt."
4. Capture the result as a `synapse_<source>_<timestamp>.md` file.

### Mode 8 Verification Plan

#### Automated Verification

* `python3 06_System/Execution/generate_sync_packet.py`: Verify JSON output integrity.
* `python3 06_System/Execution/alliance_improvement_protocol.py <mock_synapse.md>`: Verify directives are added to `task.md`.

#### Manual Verification

* **Browser Interaction**: Perform a real-world sync with Claude and verify the resulting "Synapse" file captures useful directives.
* **UI Visualization**: Check the Dashboard for "Intelligence Sync" status (if implemented).
